ddls:
CREATE TABLE "stocks" (
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock */,
  "stock_symbol" TEXT /* Ticker symbol of the stock */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Name of the company associated with the stock */,
  "exchange" TEXT /* Stock exchange where the stock is traded */,
  "sector" TEXT /* Sector of the stock (e.g., Technology, Finance) */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry of the stock (e.g., Software, Banking) */,
  "market_cap" REAL /* Market capitalization of the company */,
  "ipo_date" TEXT /* IPO date of the company */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "daily_prices" (
  "price_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each daily price entry */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock to which these prices belong */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the recorded prices */,
  "open" REAL /* Opening price of the stock on that date */,
  "low" REAL /* Lowest price of the stock on that date */,
  "high" REAL /* Highest price of the stock on that date */,
  "close" REAL /* Closing price of the stock on that date */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Total volume of stocks traded on that date */,
  "amount" REAL /* Total monetary amount of stocks traded on that date */,
  "adjusted_close" REAL /* Adjusted closing price considering dividends and splits */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("price_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_daily_prices_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trading_sessions" (
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trading session */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the trading session */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the trading session */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the trading session */,
  "exchange" TEXT /* Stock exchange where the session is held */,
  "session_type" TEXT /* Type of trading session (e.g., regular, extended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_indices" (
  "index_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each market index */,
  "index_name" TEXT /* Name of the market index (e.g., S&P 500) */,
  "base_date" TEXT /* Base date for the index calculation */,
  "base_value" REAL /* Base value of the index on the base date */,
  "index_type" TEXT /* Type of market index (e.g., stock market index, bond market index) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("index_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "index_prices" (
  "index_price_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each index price entry */,
  "index_id" INTEGER /* ID of the market index */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the recorded prices */,
  "opening_value" REAL /* Opening value of the index on that date */,
  "closing_value" REAL /* Closing value of the index on that date */,
  "high_value" REAL /* Highest value of the index on that date */,
  "low_value" REAL /* Lowest value of the index on that date */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("index_price_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_index_prices_index_id FOREIGN KEY ("index_id") REFERENCES market_indices ("index_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., trader, analyst, admin) */,
  "subscription_plan" TEXT /* Subscription plan of the user (e.g., basic, premium) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_activity" (
  "activity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each activity log */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user performing the action */,
  "action" TEXT /* Description of the action performed (e.g., view, download) */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the action occurred */,
  "resource" TEXT /* Resource accessed by the user (e.g., stock data, market index) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("activity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_activity_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "forecasts" (
  "forecast_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each forecast entry */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock for which the forecast is made */,
  "forecast_date" TEXT /* Date of the forecast */,
  "predicted_price" REAL /* Predicted price of the stock on the forecast date */,
  "confidence_interval" REAL /* Confidence interval of the forecast (e.g., 95%) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("forecast_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_forecasts_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who set the alert */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock for which the alert is set */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert (e.g., price increase, price decrease) */,
  "trigger_value" REAL /* Value at which the alert should trigger */,
  "threshold" REAL /* Threshold for the alert (e.g., 5% change) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user to whom the notification is sent */,
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* ID of the alert that triggered the notification */,
  "date_sent" TEXT /* Date and time when the notification was sent */,
  "message" TEXT /* Message content of the notification */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the notification (e.g., sent, read, dismissed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_alert_id FOREIGN KEY ("alert_id") REFERENCES alerts ("alert_id")
)
